notes: EX Emerald (ex9, 2005), 9 cards/pack, 36 packs/box, NO ETB (vintage). Confirmed by Bulbapedia + ThePriceDex + Elite Fourum + PSA. Set has NO gold stars (PSA article title 'No Gold'; Elite Fourum confirms; bucket list lacks gold-star). Secret rare = Farfetch'd 107/106 (1 in set). Rare slot odds from ThePriceDex EX Emerald pull-rates page: Rare Holo ex 1-in-12 packs (~3 ex/box), Rare Holo 1-in-4 packs (~9 holos/box -> Elite Fourum: Emerald has the highest avg holos-per-box of all EX-series sets), Rare 1-in-1.5 packs (~24/box). Secret rare ~0.3/box = ~1 per 3 boxes (EX-era norm, ThePriceDex/Elite Fourum). Per-pack rare-slot distribution: ex 1/12=0.0833, rare-holo 1/4=0.25, secret-rare 0.3/36=0.0083, rare=remainder 0.6584; yields ~3 ex, ~9 holo, ~24 rare, ~0.3 secret per box (matches sourced box yields). Reverse slot: EX Emerald is first English set with Holofoil Basic Energy replacing reverse in every 3rd pack; reverse slot has NO dedicated bucket so mapped onto common/uncommon filler per ThePriceDex reverse composition (rev common ~11.6 + holo energy 12 vs rev uncommon 7.0 + rev rare/holo 5.5) -> ~0.6 common / 0.4 uncommon. Confidence medium: per-set ThePriceDex study + community (Elite Fourum) cross-confirmation, but reverse-slot bucket mapping is approximate. Vintage box price carries large sealed premium so EV/pack will be well below box price - expected, rates not inflated.
